---
name: Performance Issue
about: Report a performance issue with this project
title: ''
labels: performance
assignees: ''

---

## Performance Issue

**What performance issue did you encounter?**

**Where did you encounter this issue?**
- [ ] Website
- [ ] Application
- [ ] Build process
- [ ] Asset loading
- [ ] API calls
- [ ] Database queries
- [ ] Server response
- [ ] Client-side rendering
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**What was the expected performance?**

**What was the actual performance?**

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See performance issue

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]
- Network: [e.g. Fast, Slow, Mobile]

**Performance metrics**
- Load time: [e.g. 5 seconds]
- Memory usage: [e.g. 100MB]
- CPU usage: [e.g. 50%]
- Network requests: [e.g. 25]

**Performance testing tools used**
- [ ] Google PageSpeed Insights
- [ ] Lighthouse
- [ ] GTmetrix
- [ ] WebPageTest
- [ ] Chrome DevTools
- [ ] New Relic
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Core Web Vitals (if available)**
- First Contentful Paint (FCP): [e.g. 2.5s]
- Largest Contentful Paint (LCP): [e.g. 4.2s]
- First Input Delay (FID): [e.g. 150ms]
- Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): [e.g. 0.1]

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots or performance profiles to help explain the issue.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the performance issue here.

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (major performance issue)
- [ ] High (significant impact)
- [ ] Medium (moderate issue)
- [ ] Low (minor optimization)

**Note**: Performance issues affect user experience and should be addressed!

**Note**: Include performance metrics and tools used for better analysis!

**Note**: Performance issues can affect SEO and user engagement!

**Note**: Test in different network conditions and devices!
